title: Sea-ice charting for Baltic winter navigation
summary: CMEMS sea-ice products and Sentinel-1 SAR supported safer, more efficient winter navigation and icebreaker tasking.
challenge: Rapidly changing Baltic sea ice forced conservative routing and heavy icebreaker dependence, with coarse ice information raising risk and transit times.
approach: CMEMS sea-ice concentration, thickness and drift products were combined with Sentinel-1 SAR imagery — which sees through cloud and darkness — to provide timely ice charting for route selection and icebreaker tasking.
results: The administration reported safer route selection, better icebreaker coordination and reduced transit times during the ice season.
